setting.label: Auth Token
setting.help: Your WatchSocial auth token. Get it from Settings > Integrations > Kodi on the website.

setting.label: Webhook URL
setting.help: Paste the webhook URL from your WatchSocial Media Sync settings. Looks like: https://yoursite.com/api/v1/media-sync/webhook?secret=YOUR_SECRET

setting.label: Scrobble at % watched
setting.help: Mark as watched when this percentage of the episode/movie has been played

setting.label: Send now-playing updates
setting.help: Send play/pause/resume/stop events for live now-playing tracking

setting.label: Player name
setting.help: Device name shown on your profile (e.g. Living Room Kodi)
